question: How can you remove silicone sealing ring for a multi-use pressure cooker and air fryer?
content: To remove the silicone sealing ring, grip the edge of the silicone and pull it out from behind the stainless-steel sealing ring rack.<PIC> Only use authorised Instant Pot sealing rings, do not use one that is stretched or damaged, and replace the ring every 12-18 months or sooner if it is stretched, deformed, or damaged.
ret: "To remove the silicone sealing ring, grip the edge of the silicone and pull it out from behind the stainless-steel sealing ring rack.<PIC> Only use authorised Instant Pot sealing rings, do not use one that is stretched or damaged, and replace the ring every 12-18 months or sooner if it is stretched, deformed, or damaged.",["Manual30_30"]
